# zabbix_media_type (Resource)

Manages a Zabbix media type (notification channel). Exactly one of `email_settings`, `sms_settings`, `script_settings`, or `webhook_settings` must be set and must match the `type` attribute.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Email media type
resource "zabbix_media_type" "email" {
  name        = "Email alerts"
  type        = "email"
  description = "Sends notifications via SMTP."

  email_settings = {
    smtp_server         = "smtp.example.com"
    smtp_port           = 587
    smtp_email          = "zabbix@example.com"
    smtp_helo           = "example.com"
    smtp_security       = "starttls"
    smtp_authentication = "normal_password"
    username            = "zabbix@example.com"
    password            = var.smtp_password
    content_type        = "html"
  }
}

# Webhook media type
resource "zabbix_media_type" "webhook" {
  name = "PagerDuty webhook"
  type = "webhook"

  max_sessions     = 10
  max_attempts     = 3
  attempt_interval = "10s"

  webhook_settings = {
    script  = file("${path.module}/webhook.js")
    timeout = "30s"

    parameters = [
      {
        name  = "URL"
        value = "https://events.pagerduty.com/v2/enqueue"
      },
      {
        name  = "Token"
        value = var.pagerduty_token
      },
    ]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the media type. Must be unique within Zabbix.
- `type` (String) Media type channel. One of: `email`, `sms`, `script`, `webhook`.

### Optional

- `attempt_interval` (String) Interval between delivery attempts (e.g. `10s`, `1m`). Defaults to `10s`.
- `description` (String) Description of the media type.
- `email_settings` (Attributes) Email-specific settings. Required when `type` is `email`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email_settings))
- `max_attempts` (Number) Maximum number of delivery attempts. Defaults to `3`.
- `max_sessions` (Number) Maximum number of concurrent sessions. Defaults to `1`.
- `message_templates` (Attributes List) Per-event-source notification templates. If unset, Zabbix defaults are used. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--message_templates))
- `script_settings` (Attributes) Script-specific settings. Required when `type` is `script`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--script_settings))
- `sms_settings` (Attributes) SMS-specific settings. Required when `type` is `sms`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sms_settings))
- `status` (String) Whether the media type is active. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`. Defaults to `enabled`.
- `webhook_settings` (Attributes) Webhook-specific settings. Required when `type` is `webhook`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--webhook_settings))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the media type.

<a id="nestedatt--email_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `email_settings`

Required:

- `smtp_email` (String) From address for outgoing email.
- `smtp_server` (String) SMTP server address.

Optional:

- `content_type` (String) Email content type. One of: `text`, `html`. Defaults to `html`.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) SMTP authentication password. Sensitive; not returned by the API after creation.
- `smtp_authentication` (String) SMTP authentication method. One of: `none`, `normal_password`. Defaults to `none`.
- `smtp_helo` (String) SMTP HELO/EHLO hostname.
- `smtp_port` (Number) SMTP server port. Defaults to `25`.
- `smtp_security` (String) SMTP connection security. One of: `none`, `starttls`, `ssl_tls`. Defaults to `none`.
- `username` (String) SMTP authentication username.


<a id="nestedatt--message_templates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `message_templates`

Required:

- `eventsource` (Number) Event source: 0=triggers, 1=discovery, 2=autoregistration, 3=internal, 4=services.
- `message` (String) Message body.
- `recovery` (Number) Recovery: 0=operations, 1=recovery, 2=update.
- `subject` (String) Message subject.


<a id="nestedatt--script_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `script_settings`

Required:

- `exec_path` (String) Path to the script on the Zabbix server.

Optional:

- `exec_params` (String) Script parameters, one per line.


<a id="nestedatt--sms_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sms_settings`

Required:

- `gsm_modem` (String) Serial device path of the GSM modem (e.g. `/dev/ttyS0`).


<a id="nestedatt--webhook_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `webhook_settings`

Required:

- `script` (String) JavaScript body of the webhook.

Optional:

- `event_menu_name` (String) Label for the event menu entry. Used when `show_event_menu` is `true`.
- `event_menu_url` (String) URL for the event menu entry. Used when `show_event_menu` is `true`.
- `parameters` (Attributes List) Key/value pairs passed to the webhook script. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--webhook_settings--parameters))
- `process_tags` (Boolean) Whether to add event tags from webhook response. Defaults to `false`.
- `show_event_menu` (Boolean) Whether to add a link to the event menu. Defaults to `false`.
- `timeout` (String) Script execution timeout (e.g. `30s`). Defaults to `30s`.

<a id="nestedatt--webhook_settings--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `webhook_settings.parameters`

Required:

- `name` (String) Parameter name.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Parameter value. Sensitive.
